questions.question: Did Germany submit the progress report requested by GRECO for 31 March 2026, and has GRECO assessed it?
questions.basis: GRECO's 2025 report set the deadline, while the public Germany Fifth Round page still lists the August 2025 Second Compliance Report as the latest public report.
questions.safe_interpretation: The absence of a newer public report does not prove non-submission or non-compliance; it may be pending, confidential, unadopted or unpublished.
